Chapter 126

It was Gu Lang’s fault no matter how he
Hearing Gu Bai’s laughter, Si Yiming’s whole body’s shadow became
deeper.
In the eyes of the gods and beasts, in fact, most of the creatures are treated
equally-but this definitely does not include being forced to become a dog.
Just be reasonable, if you can actively choose, even if you become a
Tibetan Mastiff, it is better than Corgi!
With a look of Corgi, what is his majesty as Pai Yao!
Si Yiming held Huang Bai Keji’s soft and non-aggressive face, turned his
head and glanced at the little black leopard who looked as pitiful as the half
of his body. He couldn’t distinguish them for a while. Who is more unlucky
in the end?
Gu Bai noticed the abnormal atmosphere, and quickly coughed, hardened
his face and put a smile away.
“How can you become a Corgi?” He said, raising his foot and walking into
Bai Ze’s house.
Xie Zhi stood at the door and watched Gu Bai walk in unimpeded all the
way in. He was slightly relieved, and replied, “What is Corgi? There are
also people who can become various kinds of dinosaurs and girls. The soul
out of the body and some dreaming things.”
The things that Bai Ze has picked up over the years are very safe, but there
are all kinds of weird ones.
Xie Zhi was also caught. He accidentally fell into Zhai Liangjun’s dream
and abruptly awakened Zhai Liangjun, who was happily dating the goddess
in his dream.
Gu Bai, who picked up the Baize potted plant, listened to thank you for
giving an example, and exclaimed: “…Wow!”
Xie Zhi thought for a while and said, “If you are curious, look back to Si
Yiming to show you a fun.”
Gu Bai looked at Corgi in the middle of the field, thought about it, and
shook his head regretfully.
He felt that after experiencing this time, Mr. Si would never step into Bai
Ze’s house again.
“Actually, I should do this.” Gu Bai said.
After all, he was lucky.
Mr. Si would follow in the footsteps of his old father and Bai Ze. Gu Bai
hadn’t really thought about it.
Because when I was with him last time, although Mr. Si was frequently
recruited, it was not a big trouble. Although it was caused by fire, flood,
and wind and thunder, it was a small problem for Mr. Si.
There was even no way to break his defense.
This time, why did he become a Corgi directly.
Dad has disappeared from the waist down.
Gu Bai handed Bai Ze to Xie Zhi, and then went in again. After being
recruited, he calmly squatted inside and waited for the rescuers to hug Corgi
and the little black leopard.
It is better to rely on yourself than on the ground.
Gu Bai sighed and rubbed Mr. Si’s head: “It’s okay, Mr. Si, I’ll be fine.”
Si Yiming didn’t say a word.
He felt that the reason why he was so unlucky this time must be because he
had brought Gu Lang’s pot.
The last time he was with Gu Bai, although it was irritating, it didn’t cause
any terrible consequences-anyway, the matter of him becoming another
species really never happened.
In the past, Bai Ze’s lack of arms and legs turned into all kinds of weird
things, and occasionally he even disappeared, saying that he had traveled to
some other world.
And Si Yiming himself always respects the Bai Ze family that has not been
sorted out. Every time he goes to find Bai Ze, he stands at the door and
waits for him to come out.
The only time I went in was with Gu Bai. Si Yiming felt that the minor
flaws of those magical artifacts were acceptable, so he was less wary.
This time I didn’t take Gu Bai with Gu Lang, and it didn’t take long to start
the search before the car overturned.
It was Gu Lang’s fault no matter how he thought it.
Mr. Secretary throws the pot mercilessly.
Gu Bai touched Corgi’s head, paused, then rubbed Corgi’s soft belly, and
finally couldn’t help but put his face on Corgi and rubbed it hard.
Si Yiming paused, then stretched out his short legs to push Gu Bai away
and let him continue rubbing for three seconds, before finally choosing the
latter.
After a long while, Gu Bai looked at Corgi with helpless gaze. After two
seconds, he was in a daze and finally realized what he had done. He quickly
stood up straight, and looked away embarrassedly.
Gu Lang next to him lowered his head and looked at himself, then looked at
the fur on Si Yiming’s body, and snorted unhappily.
It really seems that his appearance is not very suitable for rubbing hair.
Gu Lang sat down and licked his only paw.
It’s strange to say that he can still walk as usual now, and he can clearly feel
his limbs are sound and the feeling of stepping on the ground, but when he
looks down, it is empty, invisible and intangible.
The place he can touch now is the size of a palm, and the fault that
disappears indistinctly behind it still looks a bit scary.
Others don’t know, but with his timidity, he would definitely not try to play
a leopard in this state.
Gu Lang looked at himself and then at Si Yiming, feeling a little
uncomfortable.
He didn’t want to lose to Si Yiming anywhere-to be precise, he didn’t want
to lose to anyone, he just wanted to be the first in the day.
Dreaming of the first glutton of the day, squatting uncomfortably at the door
of Baize’s house, raised his paws and grabbed the fleshy meat that was also
placed at the door of the house, with a “meow”.
Gu Bai paused, and heard some urging from inside.
Si Yiming also raised a front paw and pushed Gu Bai into Baize’s room.
“Okay, okay, I… I’ll help you find it.” Gu Bai said, putting Corgi down,
turning his head and entering Bai Ze’s house.
Si Yiming turned to look at Xie Zhi.
Xie Zhi stared at him for a long while. Mr. Xie felt very happy and looked
at the watch in his hand: “I’m a takeaway.”
Corgi nodded with a serious face, and refused to make Corgi’s cry very
strongly.
Before figuring out how to speak human words in a canine way, Si Yiming
will never lose his dignity as a Pai Yao!
It doesn’t matter if Gu Bai doesn’t sleep at night for four or five days. He
simply spends all his time outside of work on restoring the three non-
humans here.
In this week, the monsters who are keen to watch the excitement of Jiuzhou
Shanhaiyuan have witnessed with their own eyes the 1,000 kinds of
consequences of using the treasures of the Baize family.
From the third day on, Si Yiming, whose soul was stabbed out of his body
by a sword, sat next to his body, watching his body being turned into a
variety of strange creatures by magical instruments, and only felt that his
brain was so painful to death. .
However, he was lucky. He turned his head and looked at Gu Lang. He had
even experienced such things as becoming a female and being struck by fire
and lightning. The whole beast was tossed and weakened for several
degrees, which was very embarrassing.
However, it was not without benefits. Si Yiming watched Gu Bai take a
rough picture of the artifact and marked it as a function. He felt that the
safety of Bai Ze’s home would increase a lot in the future.
——After all, before Gu Bai, no one really dared to sit at Bai Ze’s house
and do this sort of organizing artifacts.
Gu Lang turned his head and left at the moment he recovered, leaving the
sad place very neatly.
However, Si Yiming thought about it under Gu Bai’s particularly pitiful
eyes, and went out.
Gu Bai was stayed at Bai Ze’s house, while continuing to test the
instruments and record them, while learning from Bai Ze, who had
intermittent memory loss, how to reach his destination safely.
It’s okay when you don’t need to face Bai Ze directly, and when you really
get along, Gu Bai finally discovered that this is a job that requires patience
and restraint.
No wonder when I came back this time, my dad’s temper seemed to have
reduced a lot.
According to the situation of the last time they met, even if it became
inconvenient to move, it did not prevent them from doing it. This time they
did not actually do it, and they sat together peacefully. Gu Bai felt that the
family was harmonious. Just around the corner.
Gu Bai simply ignored the subtle smell of gunpowder that had always
spread between Mr. Si and his old father, full of expectations.
Thanks to Bai Ze, he thought, and then holding the scroll of jade slips, he
continued to ask Bai Ze: “Where is this place?”
Bai Ze tilted his head to look over, heard his question, remembered for a
while, and then said: “The source of the Tianhe River.”
Gu Bai heard it, took out the original, and wrote it down.
In the past few days, he ran over to grind Baize at work during the day and
night, and finally pieced together a little bit of heaven.
At the bottom of the outer sky is the Netherworld that Gu Bai has been to.
And the nine-tier sky is traversed by a Tianhe, which is the source of the
great flood that fell from the sky after the mountain collapsed.
In the past, immortals lived on the third to fifth floors of the outer sky, and
Jianmu passed through the first two layers of the sky that humans can see,
leading directly to the third outer sky.
Upward is the residence of the immortal, where the Tianhe River flows
smoothly and softly, and the sky and the galaxy are out of reach by pouring
water from the Tianhe River on the sky.
And starting from the sixth level, no one can step into it.
There are gang winds and thunderstorms, which are all kinds of dangers
that have existed since the reckless era, and put an end to the footsteps of
most immortals.
Later, the mountain collapsed, Jianmu was crushed, and the flood raged. As
one of the few people who could enter the sixth level or above, Nuwa, who
was one of the few people who could enter the sixth level or above,
discovered the source, refined the five-color stone, and rushed to the hole.
It’s blocked.
After blocking, in order to avoid any consequences caused by immortals
entering by mistake, she smoothly sealed the uppermost triple heaven and
outer sky, leaving only a back door for herself.
As a result, no one expected that the immortals fell one after another, and
Nu Wa and the others disappeared one by one. In the end, only the spiritual
things born in these heavens and earth survived.
When Gu Bai heard these stories about Quandang, he asked curiously,
“Where did the Nuwa Empress and the others go?”
It is okay to ask Bai Ze this question, because Bai Ze knows everything in
the Three Realms and the Six Ways.
When Bai Ze was asked a question, he thought about it and replied: “It’s
transformed into this world.”
Gu Bai se sorprendió.
“Today’s aura of mountains and rivers is all transformed by those great
abilities at the beginning.” Bai Ze replied softly.
When he said this, there was a deep gentleness between his eyebrows and
eyes: “Just like the great God Pangu who transformed into all things after
he opened up the heavens and the earth, they were born of the chaos of the
heavens and the earth, and eventually returned to the chaos of the heavens
and the earth. We will come to the Mandate At that time, they will get the
same fate as them.”
From the avenue to the simplicity, the cycle goes back and forth, endlessly.
Gu Bai understood a little ignorantly.
Probably it means that the dust will return to the dust, Gu Bai thought.
“Then I set out from Netherworld, right?” Gu Bai looked at the map on the
jade slip and stood up. “How long does it take?”
Bai Ze looked at him suspiciously: “What?”
Gu Bai asked again: “How long does it take to patch the sky?”
Bai Ze said: “It won’t take long. If it goes smoothly, it won’t take a month.”
Gu Bai nodded when he heard the words, and glanced at the time on his
watch: “Then I will go to work first.”
After Gu Bai handed Bai Ze to the real estate brother who came after
hearing the news, he turned his head and went downstairs, went to the
garage and pushed his little eDonkey out.
He stepped on the little eDonkey, thought of the subject of the job he was
holding, and thought of the precariousness of the heavens mentioned by Bai
Ze piecemeal, and faintly had a bold idea in his heart.
The idea is not concrete yet, there is a person standing in front of his little
eDonkey.
Gu Bai was taken aback, raised his head in thought, and saw his Mr. Si.
Mr. Si seems to have just returned from the outside at this moment, still
carrying a bag in his hand. It seems that there are living things in the bag,
arching and arching.
“Mr. Si?” Gu Bai rolled his eyes on the bag.
Si Yiming paused and stuffed the bag into his arms.
“Hey?!” Gu Bai hugged the bag in a hurry, and felt a group of small warm
little guys through the bag. Whimper.
Gu Bai was taken aback, looking from the nets on both sides of the bag, he
ran into the face of a small yellow and white Corgi on the side.
Si Yiming looked at Gu Bai who raised his head in surprise. After
observing Gu Bai’s expression, he said hesitantly, “I think you like it…”
Gu Bai was stunned for a long while, holding a pet bag with a small Corgi
in his arms, and couldn’t help but show a smile comparable to the little sun
rising in the east.
“Thank you Mr. Si! I raise it!”
Gu Bai happily unzipped the zipper of the pet bag, and rubbed Corgi’s ****
that he had thought about for a long time, but because his deity was Mr. Si
before, he didn’t dare to start.
Si Yiming:…
